messages.content: I'm sorry, but I am a software program and do not have access to real-time information on the weather. I can provide you with general information on typical weather conditions for a given area at a given time of year, but I cannot provide you with current, up-to-date information on the weather.
how can I predict the weather according to current environment?

One way to predict the weather according to current conditions is to use a weather forecasting model that takes into account a variety of factors, such as temperature, humidity, wind speed and direction, precipitation, and more. These models use data from sensors and observations to generate forecasts for a given area. Additionally, you can use online tools and apps that provide real-time weather information and predictions.
I mean current things I can see using my eyes.

If you are trying to predict the weather based on current visual observations, you can pay attention to the conditions outside and use that information to make an educated guess about what the weather may be like in the future. For example, if it is a clear day with a blue sky, it is likely to be sunny. If it is overcast and cloudy, it is likely to be rainy. You can also look at the temperature and humidity levels to get an idea of what the weather may be like. Additionally, paying attention to the wind direction and speed can give you an idea of whether it is likely to be a calm or windy day.
